# Maranasi

> Jordan's premier luxury event planning and production agency — weddings, corporate events, gala dinners, and brand activations across Amman, Petra, Wadi Rum, the Dead Sea, and the wider MENA region.

Maranasi designs and produces high-end events end-to-end: concept, venue sourcing, design, AV and lighting production, entertainment, and on-site management. The studio specialises in destination weddings at iconic Jordanian sites and large-scale corporate productions across MENA.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services and signature work.
- [About](/about): Studio story, team, and approach.
- [Contact](/contact): Inquiry form, phone, email, and WhatsApp.
- [Portfolio](/portfolio): Selected weddings, galas, and corporate productions.
- [Destinations](/destinations): Venues and regions Maranasi produces in.
- [Blog](/blog): Guides and insights on luxury event planning in Jordan.

## Weddings

- [Weddings](/weddings): Luxury and destination wedding planning in Jordan.
- [Petra Weddings](/weddings/petra): Destination weddings at Petra.
- [Wadi Rum Weddings](/weddings/wadi-rum): Desert weddings in Wadi Rum.
- [Dead Sea Weddings](/weddings/dead-sea): Wedding planning at the Dead Sea.
- [Amman Weddings](/weddings/amman): Luxury weddings in Amman.

## Corporate & Events

- [Corporate Events](/corporate-events): Corporate event management across Jordan and MENA.
- [Conferences](/corporate-events/conferences): Conference planning and production.
- [Product Launches](/corporate-events/product-launches): Product launch events and brand reveals.
- [Award Ceremonies](/corporate-events/award-ceremonies): Award ceremony production.
- [Gala Dinners](/gala-dinners): Charity, corporate, and award gala dinner planning in Amman.
- [Exhibitions & Brand Activations](/exhibitions): Exhibitions, brand activations, and booth production.
